props.name: aside
props.comment: Side panel rendered alongside the record content.

props.name: component
props.comment: Override the root element wrapping the record content. Defaults to 'div'.

props.name: error
props.comment: Content to display when a data-fetch error occurs. Defaults to a built-in error message.

props.name: offline
props.comment: Content to display when the browser is offline and the record is still loading.
